description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, artefact, and publish. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./gradlew -i -g .gradle classes. In the test stage add a test job that runs ./gradlew -i -g .gradle check, always stores the build/reports/tests directory as an artifact for 1 week. In the artefact stage add an artefact job that runs ./gradlew -i -g .gradle assemble and stores the built JAR files (build/libs/*.jar) as artifacts for 1 week. In the publish stage add a publish job that runs ./gradlew -i -g .gradle -PbintrayUser=$BINTRAY_USER -PbintrayKey=$BINTRAY_KEY -PsonatypeOssUser=$SONATYPE_OSS_USER -PsonatypeOssPassword=$SONATYPE_OSS_PASSWORD bintrayUpload, stores the JARs and Maven metadata as artifacts for 1 week, runs only on the master branch, and is manual. Cache the .gradle/wrapper and .gradle/caches directories between jobs.
